title: Ludas Game (The Game of Truth)
subtitle: Instrumental phase; a forged method designed to strip false certainty.
description: A cognitive tool designed as a severance protocol to strip false certainty and test belief structures through meta-cognitive play. It serves as a purification mechanism that separates self from belief by exposing ideas to potentially destructive conditions.

motifMap.meaning: A forged method designed not to produce truth, but to strip false certainty.

excerpt: If it cannot survive use, it deserves to be destroyed.

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “Ludus Veritatis (The Game of Truth)”

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0. Filename: ludas-game.phase-ash-moon-severance.metadata.v2.6.1.json
